name: Building Energy Optimizer
note: Estimates based on Azure retail pricing. Actual costs depend on usage, region, reserved instances, and enterprise agreements.

services.name: Azure Digital Twins
services.purpose: Digital twin models of building systems — HVAC zones, lighting circuits, occupancy patterns, energy meters, thermal dynamics for real-time simulation and optimization

services.name: Azure IoT Hub
services.purpose: Ingest BMS sensor data — temperature, humidity, CO2, occupancy counters, energy meters, HVAC valve positions, lighting levels, weather station feeds

services.name: Azure OpenAI
services.purpose: GPT-4o for energy optimization reasoning — HVAC schedule recommendations, anomaly explanation, occupant comfort trade-off analysis, sustainability report narratives

services.name: Azure Functions
services.purpose: Sensor data normalization, digital twin state updates, energy anomaly detection triggers, HVAC setpoint adjustment commands, scheduled optimization runs

enterprise.note: 8 vCPU, dedicated compute, sub-second twin sync

services.name: Cosmos DB
services.purpose: Energy consumption history, optimization decisions, occupancy patterns, comfort scores, equipment runtime logs, sustainability KPIs

enterprise.note: Multi-region, analytical store for energy trending

services.name: Azure Machine Learning
services.purpose: Predictive models for thermal dynamics, occupancy forecasting, energy demand prediction, HVAC fault detection, and optimal setpoint calculation

enterprise.note: GPU compute, deep learning thermal models, real-time inference

services.name: Key Vault
services.purpose: BMS integration credentials, BACnet gateway certificates, utility API keys, energy data encryption keys

services.name: Application Insights
services.purpose: Twin sync latency, optimization loop timing, sensor health, energy savings tracking, HVAC command success rates

optimization_tips: Use GPT-4o-mini for routine daily energy summaries and occupant notifications, reserve GPT-4o for complex multi-system optimization reasoning and sustainability reports — saves 65% on AI costs
Reduce Digital Twins update frequency for stable systems — HVAC zones at thermal equilibrium need updates every 5 minutes, not every 30 seconds, cutting twin operation costs by 80%
Aggregate sensor readings at IoT Hub routing level — average temperature/humidity over 1-minute windows before twin updates rather than processing every raw reading
Schedule ML model retraining during off-peak hours (weekends/nights) using spot compute — thermal dynamics models only need daily retraining, not continuous
Implement tiered storage in Cosmos DB — keep 30 days of granular sensor data in hot storage, aggregate to hourly averages for archival, reducing storage costs by 60%
Set Azure Cost Management budgets with alerts at 50%, 80%, 100%
